name: TikTok
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of TikTok's design language — the short-form-video platform built on a pure black canvas with a signature cyan-and-magenta chromatic-aberration (Aqua #25F4EE + Magenta #FE2C55) reserved for the brand mark and selected moments, a video-first vertical feed taking 100% of the viewport, and a strict 'content is the entire surface' approach where chrome floats over content. The brand reads as 'youthful, kinetic, slightly glitch-aesthetic.'

design_language.motion_signature: Signature is the cyan-and-magenta chromatic-aberration on the brand mark and on hero brand-mark animations — the two colors shift 4px apart at 600ms; vertical feed videos use snap-scroll behavior; heart pulse on double-tap scales to 1.4x at 300ms with red particle burst.

trademark_signals: Chromatic-aberration brand mark — the d-shaped note glyph rendered with cyan (#25F4EE) offset behind magenta (#FE2C55) — the brand's most-recognized signature
Pure black canvas (#000000) — the video-first vertical feed sits on absolute black so the content reads as the only luminous element
Vertical 9:16 video feed at full viewport height — the brand inverts the typical landscape-card pattern; video IS the page
Right-rail icon stack — like, comment, share, follow rendered as floating circular icons over video content — chrome floats, doesn't anchor
Magenta voltage (#FE2C55) for primary CTAs, heart-liked state, and brand-mark accent; aqua is reserved for the brand-mark only
ai_slop_avoided: Don't paint backgrounds in the brand chromatic-aberration. The cyan-magenta effect is reserved for the brand mark and brand-mark animations only
Don't substitute the canvas with near-black or navy. The brand requires pure black so video content reads as the only luminous element
Don't invert to a landscape feed. Vertical 9:16 IS the brand's structural signature
Don't add a third accent color. Magenta for chrome, aqua for the mark, white for type — three colors only
Don't anchor chrome at the bottom of cards. Right-rail floating icons are the brand pattern
